response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced software engineer but fundamentally lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows. Their professional background is heavily centered around TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang for web and full-stack applications. Additionally, they lack the required deep domain expertise in Fixed Income, Derivatives, or Investment Banking, making them an unsuitable fit for this specialized role.
strengths: Extensive overall software development experience (10+ years) across various modern tech stacks and architectural patterns.
Strong background in CI/CD pipelines, Test-Driven Development (TDD), and software craftsmanship.
Possesses some financial sector exposure through a past role at RIDE Capital, alongside strong foundational scripting and Java skills.
concerns: Fails to meet the mandatory requirement of 5-10 years of C++ experience, having only ~7 months of professional C/C++ experience in 2014-2015.
Lacks the mandatory domain expertise in Fixed Income, Capital Markets, or Investment Banking.
No demonstrated deep experience with SQL Server or Oracle on the Windows platform, heavily favoring Linux, MongoDB, and MySQL.
